name: procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month, missed invoice deadlines cause late payments. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of invoice due dates.
target_audience: procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month
problem_solved: missed invoice deadlines leading to late payments
features: weekly email alerts for upcoming invoice due dates
manual entry for vendor and invoice details
